message:
feat(reactor): complete Event/Events types and RAII Registration

- Refactor Event struct to use ready: Interest instead of separate bools
- Add Event convenience methods (is_readable, is_writable, is_error, is_hangup)
- Add Events container with capacity management and enforcement
- Implement Registration type with RAII deregistration (Drop impl)
- Add ReactorHandle trait for reactor operations needed by Registration
- Add set_interest() for modifying registration interest
- Include Weak reactor reference for safe drop when reactor is gone
- Add comprehensive tests for Event, Events, Token, and Registration

Closes: asupersync-kja2, asupersync-553y

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
